chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: customer, items, payment status, delivery information

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: at least one Order Line Item

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: order, purchase order, transaction, customer order

triplets.subject: Refund
triplets.object: a customer when an order is cancelled

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

entities_post_resolution.name: Is Active
entities_post_resolution.definition: A boolean attribute that indicates whether a product or item is active (orderable and for sale) or inactive, with inactive items retained for historical/reference purposes.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Inactive products cannot be ordered but remain for historical reference

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is a single entry on a sales order or invoice that references one product, records the ordered quantity and unit price at the time of order, and computes the extended amount.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line-item record in a sales order system that links a specific order to a specific product, identified by a primary key and containing foreign keys ORDER_ID and PRODUCT_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line within a Sales Order that specifies a product, quantity, and unit price, and is identified by a unique line identifier.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The PARENT_CATEGORY_ID in TB_CATEGORY that stores the ID of its parent category, implemented as a self-referential foreign key to model category hierarchy.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: An individual payment transaction linked to a specific Sales Order, including payment method, amount, confirmation timestamp, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Display Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: The product's human-readable display name used for UI presentation and catalog labeling.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Human-readable product name

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: Sales Order Header (SALES_ORDER_HDR) represents the header record of a sales order, identified by ORDER_ID and including the customer linkage via CUST_ID, which is referenced by line items and payments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is the record representing the physical movement of goods from a source warehouse to a destination address, linked to exactly one Sales Order, identified by a unique Shipment ID, and containing shipping details such as ship timestamp, tracking number, and status (e.g., PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Sales Order is the formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply products, created when a checkout is completed and containing the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | **Business Context**: Orders are created when customers complete checkout. They track the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED | **Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Business Rules**:
- Cannot be shipped until payment is confirmed | **Business Rules**:
- Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped | **Business Rules**:
- Status changes are logged for audit purposes | **Synonyms**: order, purchase order, transaction, customer order | **Related Concepts**: Customer, OrderLineItem, CustomerAddress | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed an

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The primary key column TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID that uniquely identifies a product in the TB_PRODUCT table.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: A master data entity representing registered platform customers, identified by the CUST_ID primary key and referenced by related transactional records such as orders.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: A physical address associated with a customer that is used as the destination for shipments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | Customer Relationships:
- A Customer places zero or more Sales Orders
- A Customer has one or more Customer Addresses

entities_post_resolution.name: Email Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: A unique email address that serves as the user's login credential in the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login)

entities_post_resolution.name: Extended Amount
entities_post_resolution.definition: The extended amount is the line-item total value for an order, equal to quantity times unit price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

entities_post_resolution.name: Eur
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unit price per unit for a product on a single line item of a sales order, recorded at the time of order (historical).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price in base currency (EUR) | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

entities_post_resolution.name: Quantity
entities_post_resolution.definition: Quantity: a count of the number of units ordered in a transaction or per line item.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

entities_post_resolution.name: Region Code
entities_post_resolution.definition: Geographic region code used for tax purposes.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy: a business policy that specifies the conditions, timeframe, and eligibility for returning products, often resulting in a refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Addresses Delivery
entities_post_resolution.definition: A set of client/customer addresses stored in the system, organized by address type (e.g., delivery, billing), with support for multiple addresses per type and a single primary address per type.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

entities_post_resolution.name: Orders
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Platform
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

entities_post_resolution.name: Purchase
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipments
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products.

entities_post_resolution.name: Valid Category
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Must belong to a valid category before being sold
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identification, contact details, regional segmentation, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, naming, category reference, pricing, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores the hierarchical categories used to classify products, including each category's name and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores the header information for sales orders, including identity, customer reference, order timing, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timestamp, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual line items that compose each order, including the product, quantity, unit price, and total line amount for that item.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments tied to customer orders, including payment method, amount, status, and timestamps for when the payment was confirmed and created.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments linked to customer orders, including where and when shipped, tracking details, and current shipment status.
